subtitles.original: コブラ Only few memories after you
subtitles.english: Cobra, only few memories after you

subtitles.original: 背中にまといつく翳りは
subtitles.english: The shadow clinging to his back,

subtitles.original: オトコという名のものがたり
subtitles.english: Is a story called a man,

subtitles.original: 許されるはずもない Peace & Love
subtitles.english: There's no forgiveness, just peace & love.
Crossing the sky, a silent voice,
He looks up at the darkness alone, it's him.

subtitles.original: コブラ Only few memories after you
subtitles.english: Cobra, only few memories after you.

subtitles.original: ハートに刻まれたあの日は
subtitles.english: That day carved into his heart,

subtitles.original: ロマンと呼ぶには熱過ぎて
subtitles.english: Was too hot to call romance,

subtitles.original: めぐりくるはずもない Peace & Love
subtitles.english: And there's no way it will come around again, peace & love.
